_meta.description: Universal operator trigger patterns for monitor operator. Grammar-only, locale-aware, non-domain specific, with disambiguation and multi-intent split hints.

defaultFirstStepWhen: single action verb with explicit target
no followup verb in same sentence
defaultLaterStepWhen: chain begins with helper verb only

positives: sample monitor in english with explicit target
exemplo monitor in portugues com alvo
negatives: This is not an operation request
